name: Jet Lag
overview:
Kreetha, a young man with a guileless appearance, is forced to become a spy for Porn, the owner of a low-cost airline that is going bankrupt. His mission is to infiltrate Glamorous Airlines, a rival airline full of secrets.

Chaos ensures thanks to his eccentric coworkers: Phi Chai, Allnew, Tidgif, Chaba, and Sky, plus the unpredictable passengers on each flight, making every trip a constant headache!
